name: chatgpt-session-converter
description: Browser-only batch converter for ChatGPT, CPA, sub2api, Cockpit and related JSON formats.

scripts.test: node tests/convert-session.test.js && node tests/at-to-sub2api.test.js && node tests/at-to-cpa.test.js && node --test tests/quota-server.test.js tests/quota-integration.test.js tests/agent-register.integration.test.js tests/visits.test.js && python tests/test_agent_backend.py
